pages.text: Every December Gugu and Cici travel with Mom to Joburg. Their best bit? Riding the long-distance train together.

blocks.text: Every December Gugu and Cici travel with Mom to Joburg.
Their best bit? Riding the long-distance train together.

pages.text: “This year I’m taking the window seat!” says Cici. “Not fair! You had it last year,” Gugu shouts.

blocks.text: “This year I’m taking the window seat!” says Cici.
“Not fair! You had it last year,” Gugu shouts.

pages.text: “Race!” says Gugu. Off they go, running down the platform. Cici reaches it first.

blocks.text: “Race!” says Gugu.
Off they go, running down the platform.
Cici reaches it first.

pages.text: “Rock, paper, scissors!” says Cici. This time, Gugu wins.

blocks.text: “Rock, paper, scissors!” says Cici.
This time, Gugu wins.

pages.text: Mom decides, “You’ll share the window. Half the trip is for Gugu, half for Cici.”

blocks.text: Mom decides, “You’ll share the window. Half the trip is for Gugu, half for Cici.”

pages.text: They get on the train. No! Every window seat is taken.

blocks.text: They get on the train.
No! Every window seat is taken.

pages.text: The sisters sit in the aisle seats. They peek at the window. They wish they could see the view.

blocks.text: The sisters sit in the aisle seats. They peek at the window. They wish they could see the view.

pages.text: The lady sitting in the window seat drops her handbag. The sisters pick it up and hand it back.

blocks.text: The lady sitting in the window seat drops her handbag.
The sisters pick it up and hand it back.

pages.text: “Thank you, girls. Would you like to sit here by the window?” “Yes!”

blocks.text: “Thank you, girls. Would you like to sit here by the window?” “Yes!”

pages.text: Gugu leans close to the window. “Into the tunnel!” she yells.

blocks.text: Gugu leans close to the window. “Into the tunnel!” she yells.

pages.text: Out comes the sun again. Cici jumps into the window seat. “Look!”

blocks.text: Out comes the sun again.
Cici jumps into the window seat. “Look!”

pages.text: Finally they fall asleep. They will wake up in Joburg. They can’t wait to tell Tata what they saw.

blocks.text: Finally they fall asleep. They will wake up in Joburg.
